title: Mardi as Red Tortoise
description: Alex Face. Iconic heritage mural in Phuket Old Town depicting Mardi as a traditional sweet cake.

title: Monochrome Elephants
description: ROA. Massive monochrome elephants on Song Wat Road, painted during Bukruk. Best viewed from the river.

title: Pukruk Bird
description: Mue Bon. Signature cartoon bird character along the Khlong Saen Saep canal path.

title: Scratching the Surface
description: Vhils. Rare relief portrait carved directly into the wall of the Portuguese Embassy.

title: Prison Wall Collaborative
description: MSV Crew. Large scale social commentary spanning the exterior walls of the abandoned Chiang Mai Women's Prison.

title: Lud Pon Festival Walls
description: Alex Face & Himbad. Dystopian murals surrounding the abandoned Chok Chai 4 fresh market.

title: Uncle and Auntie Selling O-Taw
description: Pichit Paidan. Food heritage mural on Dibuk Road, Phuket, celebrating UNESCO gastronomy status.

title: Green Men of Nimman
description: Sanchai. Hidden characters in the condo car parks and sois of Nimmanhaemin, Chiang Mai.
